category_sources: source_facts.description says cotp is a TOTP/HOTP authenticator app with import functionality.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cotp; official repository uses cotp as the project name.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TOTP/HOTP authenticator functionality; source_facts.executables lists the cotp CLI.
